S.FORM: O Afalian Lufic (Holam: ÁõßŚ≠łŚŹ°;Ikilis: Afalean Lu; 1988 a miheca saka 2 a folad saka 15 a romi'adÔľć saka) cecay mianingaya ato romadiw a tamdaw i Taywan. Taypak suli Nan'gang Kawcung a mico^yap, ca Ciyukok Unhwa Daigak sowal no France Bungak hi' ato Taypak suli Ondo Gaku'in a mico^yap. Na u micamol to malalifet Cawcisingkwangtataw i Pipahosoan to tilifi no Ciyukok .
S.PHON: o~u afa…ĺian …ĺo~u~ufi ¶ (ńßo~u…ĺam: ***;iki…ĺis: afa…ĺ…ôan …ĺo~u~u; **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * a fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ* saka) ¶…ô ¶aj mianiŇčaja ato~u ro~uma…¨~…ģiw a tam…¨~…ģaw i tajwan. tajpak so~u~u…ĺi nan °*aŇč kaw ¶o~u~uŇč a mi ¶o~u Ējap, ¶a ¶ijo~u~uko~uk o~u~unńßwa …¨~…ģai*ak so~uwa…ĺ no~u fran ¶…ô b~b~vo~u~uŇčak ńßi ° ato~u tajpak so~u~u…ĺi o~un…¨~…ģo~u *ako~u~u °in a mi ¶o~u Ējap. na o~u~u mi ¶amo~u…ĺ to~u ma…ĺa…ĺif…ôt ¶aw ¶isiŇčkwaŇčtataw i pipańßo~uso~uan to~u ti…ĺifi no~u ¶ijo~u~uko~uk .
S.FORM: O Afalian Lufic (Holam: ÁõßŚ≠łŚŹ°;Ikilis: Afalean Lu; 1988 a miheca saka 2 a folad saka 15 a romi'adÔľć saka) cecay mianingaya ato romadiw a tamdaw i Taywan. Taypak suli Nan'gang Kawcung a mico^yap, ca Ciyukok Unhwa Daigak sowal no France Bungak hi' ato Taypak suli Ondo Gaku'in a mico^yap. Na u micamol to malalifet Cawcisingkwangtataw i Pipahosoan to tilifi no Ciyukok .
